system.powerDescription:
Gain the following Power Words. 

SIGHT 
• Touch: The victim briefly becomes highly visible to Exorcists up to CAT distance, even through surfaces. • Read: The next CAT entities who read or hear this lose their ability to comprehend written language until this Word dissipates at rest. 

SOUND 
• Touch: A loud, distinctive noise emits from the victim's position. • Read: You can perfectly hear everything in CAT area as if it was next to you until the end of the scene or you deactivate the ability.
